# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
    <div class="container">
        <h1>{{ $post->title }}</h1>
        <p>{{ $post->content }}</p>

        @if ($comments->count())
            <h2>Comments</h2>
            <ul>
                @foreach ($comments as $comment)
                    <li>
                        {!! $comment->content !!}
                    </li>
                @endforeach
            </ul>
        @else
            <p>No comments yet.</p>
        @endif

        <form action="{{ route('comments.store', $post) }}" method="POST">
            @csrf
            <textarea name="content" required></textarea><br>
            <button type="submit">Add Comment</button>
        </form>
    </div>
@endsection
